data.title: Illinois Strikes Back at Crypto Scams with Bold New Law
data.description:
Illinois has passed a landmark bill requiring digital asset firms to register and disclose fees, aiming to combat crypto scams and protect investors.

The post Illinois Strikes Back at Crypto Scams with Bold New Law first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/04/11/illinois-strikes-back-at-crypto-scams/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=illinois-strikes-back-at-crypto-scams

data.title: Euro Surges Against the Dollar Amid Tariff Turbulence
data.description:
The euro has surged to a three-year high against the dollar, gaining over 5% since early April as investors sell US assets.
source: https://tokenist.com/euro-surges-against-the-dollar-amid-tariff-turbulence/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=euro-surges-against-the-dollar-amid-tariff-turbulence

data.title: BlackRock increases holdings of 4,238 ETH through its Ethereum ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring data, about ten minutes ago, BlackRock increased its holdings of 4,238 ETH through its Ethereum exchange-traded fund ETHA Ethereum ETF, worth $6.6 million. Historical data shows that this suspected BlackRock-related Ethereum ETF increased its holdings of ETH for the first time in a month.

data.description: Fed's Williams: We believe that the current tariff outline is basically clear and inflation expectations have been consolidated. (Jinshi Data APP)

data.title: Sweden: proposal to include Bitcoin in national reserves
data.description:
A Swedish MP is proposing the adoption of Bitcoin in the country's national foreign exchange reserves.
source: https://atlas21.com/sweden-proposal-to-include-bitcoin-in-national-reserves/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sweden-proposal-to-include-bitcoin-in-national-reserves

data.title: Lista DAO's lending product Lista Lending has been launched with over 92,000 BNBs lent out in the market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Lista DAO's lending product Lista Lending has been actively participated in the market after its official launch. At present, its BNB vault has more than 190,000 BNBs participating in the supply, and more than 92,000 BNBs have been borrowed, with a real-time borrowing rate as low as 0.78%. The product BNB vault now supports borrowing BNB with BTCB, solvBTC and PT-clisBNB as collateral, with a maximum loan amount of up to 52 million US dollars.
Users can borrow BNB during the Binance Launchpool to participate in the Launchpool event.

data.title: Bitcoin Outshines Stock Markets in Risk-Adjusted Terms as Fiat Strains Show
data.description:
Bitcoin's risk-adjusted returns now surpass S&P 500 despite 30% drop from peak, challenging traditional portfolio assumptions.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/bitcoin-outshines-stock-markets-in-risk-adjusted-terms-as-fiat-strains-show/

data.title: Fed's Williams: Tariffs Likely to Increase Inflation and Slow Economic Growth
data.description:
According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official John Williams has indicated that tariffs are expected to raise inflation and hinder economic growth. He emphasized that the Fed's current monetary policy is optimally positioned to manage these risks. Williams noted that during uncertain times, consumers might delay significant decisions such as purchasing homes or cars, and businesses might postpone investments until they have a clearer outlook on the future. This reduction in spending by households and businesses can lead to slower economic growth.

Williams highlighted that, given February's data showing inflation remains above target, it is appropriate for the Fed to maintain interest rates at a level that moderately restrains the economy. He stated, "The current moderately tight monetary policy stance is entirely appropriate."

Furthermore, Williams stressed the importance of maintaining good long-term inflation expectations during periods of turbulence and uncertainty to ensure price stability. He remarked that maintaining inflation expectations is crucial as the Fed pursues its goals of maximum employment and returning inflation to the long-term target of 2%.
